application_fee.details: For General & Others Candidates: Rs. 850/- (application fee + intimation charges) For SC/ ST/ PWD Candidates: Rs. 175/- (intimation charges only)

age_limit.age_details: Credit Officer MMGS-II: 25 to 35 years Credit Officer MMGS-III: 28 to 38 years Credit Officer SMGS-IV: 30 to 40 years

how_to_apply: Visit the official Bank of India careers page
Register using valid email ID and mobile number
Submit and take printout for reference

faq.question: Q1. What is the Bank of India Credit Officer Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: It is a recruitment drive by Bank of India to hire experienced Credit Officers / Credit Professionals in various scales across the bank.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are announced in BOI Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: A total of 779 vacancies have been announced for Credit Officer posts.

faq.question: Q3. What is the starting date to apply online?
faq.answer: The online application starts from 30 June 2026.

faq.question: Q4. Is experience required for this post?
faq.answer: Yes, candidates should have prior experience in credit, banking, loan processing, or risk management.

faq.question: Q5. What is the selection process for BOI Credit Officer posts?
faq.answer: The selection process generally includes shortlisting, written test/interview, and document verification.

faq.question: Q6. What is the job location?
faq.answer: Selected candidates can be posted anywhere in India as per Bank of India requirements.
